head_commit.message:
Refine rfc1574-summary to distinguish items and types

The previous wording applied "third-person singular present indicative"
uniformly, which matches function/method conventions but conflicts with
the Rust stdlib practice of using noun phrases to describe types,
modules, and fields. Split the rule along that axis and add a
type-level example.

run.display_title: Refine rfc1574-summary to distinguish items and types
